found.description: Whether a logo was detected in the screenshot

description.description: Description of the logo (e.g., 'Red text logo with wrench icon')

location.description: Where in the screenshot the logo appears

x.description: X offset from left in pixels

y.description: Y offset from top in pixels

bounding_box.description: Approximate bounding box of the logo

confidence.description: Confidence score 0-1 that this is the correct logo
